description: Japanese learning app for Brazilian students — 100% offline-first with optional Clerk auth + Cloudflare D1 sync
hardConstraints: localStorage only via services/progress/progress.local.ts (never direct setItem in components)
TypeScript strict mode — no implicit any
Clerk for auth (optional login) + Cloudflare D1 for sync (optional)
AdSense: no placement inside exercise cards, only before/after session or sidebar
Material Symbols Outlined for icons (lucide-react removed)

learning.vocabulary: artifacts/koto/src/data/vocabulary.ts must have valid N5-N2 words with id/japanese/kana/romaji/meaningPt/category/level
learning.kana: artifacts/koto/src/data/kana.ts must have 46 hiragana + 46 katakana + dakuten/handakuten/yoon
learning.exams: artifacts/koto/src/data/mockExams.ts must have questions with 4 options and correct answer
